# CWE-204 positive: different HTTP bodies reveal account state
lang: go
file: CWE-204-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-204 Observable Response Discrepancy
// Vulnerable line: distinct messages for unknown vs wrong password.
func LoginHint(c *gin.Context, users map[string]string) {
	email := c.PostForm("email")
	password := c.PostForm("password")
	stored, ok := users[email]
	if !ok {
		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "no account"})
		return
	}
	if stored != password {
		c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "bad password"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
}
